creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 172385
seahub.diff

This is an update to seahub to the most current version, 5.1.10.

* Updated to 5.1.10
 - [api] update license info
 - Fix unicode error in api response
 - [contact_email] modified 'share popup' & 'user profile'
 - update create dir sub repo api
 - [sql] Remove lock statements

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: [0]: possible direct use of command "file" found. use ${FILE} instead.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
